name: pynsi

metadata.name: pynsi
metadata.summary: NSI2000 Professional Antenna Measurement Software Automation Module

documentation:
# pynsi

NSI2000 Professional Antenna Measurement Software Automation Module

classes.name: pynsi.Measurement.Measurement

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.Measurement.MEAS_FREQUENCY
documentation:
Returns beam frequency

Returns
-------
float
  beam freqeuncy in Hertz [Hz]

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.Measurement.CLEAR_ALL_PLOTS
documentation: Clear all plot windows

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.Measurement.nsi2000Version
documentation:
Returns NSI2000 software version

Returns
-------
str
  version string

Open measurement file or bind active measurement

Parameters
----------
filename : str
           measurement file path

classes.name: pynsi.Measurement.BeamTable

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.BeamTable.Count
documentation:
Returns the number of beams in the beam table.

Returns
----------
int
  number of beams (frequencies) in the beam table

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.BeamTable.SELECT_BEAM
documentation:
Select beam from beam table

Parameters
----------
beam : int
      beam number

Beam (Frequency) table operations

Parameters
----------
meas : Measurement
       selected measurement

classes.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.EPRINC
documentation: Sets the display pol flag to Co-pol (Pol-1)
Displayed polarization

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.ECROSS
documentation: Sets the display pol flag to Cross-pol (Pol-2)

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.HPTS
documentation:
Sets/Gets number of HCut points

Parameters
----------
number : int
  number of resolution points

Returns
----------
int
  number of resolution points
Output resolution

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.VPTS
documentation:
Sets/Gets number of VCut points

Parameters
----------
number : int
  number of resolution points

Returns
----------
int
  number of resolution points

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.RESET_CENTER
documentation: Forces the H- and V-centers = 0.0
Plot center

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.AUTO_H_CENTER_ON
documentation: Forces H-peak position into the Hcenter

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.AUTO_V_CENTER_ON
documentation: Forces V-peak position into the Vcenter

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.AUTO_H_CENTER_OFF
documentation: Forces H-peak position = 0

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.AUTO_V_CENTER_OFF
documentation: Forces V-peak position = 0

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.AZ_OVER_EL
documentation: Sets the coordinate system to Az/El
Coordinate system select routines

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.EL_OVER_AZ
documentation: Sets the coordinate system to El/Az

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.THPH
documentation: Sets the coordinate system to Theta/Phi

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.L2_AZ_OVER_EL
documentation: Sets the polarization flag to EazEel
Polarization select routines

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.L2_EL_OVER_AZ
documentation: Sets the polarization flag to EalEep

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.L2_ETH_EPH
documentation: Sets the polarization flag to EalEep

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.LUDWIG3
documentation: Sets the coordinate system to L3

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.PC_OEWG
documentation: Sets the probe correction model to Open ended waveguide (OEWG)
Probe select routines

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.PROBE_OEWG_TYPE
documentation:
Returns or sets the OEWG probe model

Returns
-------
int
  OEWG probe model

  WR1500 = 0
  WR975  = 1
  WR770  = 2
  WR650  = 3
  WR510  = 4
  WR430  = 5
  WR340  = 6
  WR284  = 7
  WR229  = 8
  WR187  = 9
  WR159  = 10
  WR137  = 11
  WR112  = 12
  WR90   = 13
  WR75   = 14
  WR62   = 15
  WR51   = 16
  WR42   = 17
  WR34   = 18
  WR28   = 19
  WR22   = 20
  WR19   = 21
  WR15   = 22
  WR12   = 23

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.NO_PLOT
documentation: Produce far-field data without making a plot

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.PEAK
documentation:
Gets the “Global Peak” which is the peak value of both pols no matter what the normalization is set to

Parameters
----------
fast_process : bool
  far farfield processing for global peak search default = True

Returns
-------
float
  global peak of farfield

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.HCUT
documentation: Makes a far-field H-cut
Farfield cuts

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.VCUT
documentation: Makes a far-field V-cut

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.PEAK_H
documentation:
Returns H-axis FF peak position

Returns
-------
float
  H-axis FF peak position
Beam parameters extract routines

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.PEAK_V
documentation:
Returns V-axis FF peak position

Returns
-------
float
  V-axis FF peak position

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.beamwidth
documentation:
Returns beamwidth of last displayed cut 

Parameters
----------
beamwidthLevel : float
  beamwidth level to be calculated

Returns
-------
float
  beamwidth

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.sidelobes
documentation:
Returns sidelobes of last displayed cut

Returns
-------
tuple
  left position, left value, right position, right value

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.FF_CAL_FILENAME
documentation:
Sets the calibration filename that stores the gain reference max far-field values

Parameters
----------
filename : bool
  gain reference peak values stored in .ncl file wihch is exported by ExportGlobalPeak.bas macro
Gain calibration routines

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.FF_GAIN_TABLE_FILENAME
documentation:
Sets gain table filename that stores the obtained gain values of reference

Parameters
----------
filename : bool
  obtained gain values stored in .ngt

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.DIRECTIVITY
documentation:
Returns directivity

Returns
-------
float
  directivity in decibels [dBi]

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.CALCULATED_COMPARISON_GAIN
documentation:
Returns calculated gain comparison value

Returns
-------
float
  gain in decibels [dBi]

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.efficiency
documentation:
Returns total efficiency

Returns
-------
float
  efficiency in descibels [dB]

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.FarField.LISTING_TO_FILE
documentation: Writes the far-field data to the specified file for both polarizations

Far field processing for selected measurement

Parameters
----------
meas : Measurement
       selected measurement

classes.name: pynsi.Measurement.Script

methods.name: pynsi.Measurement.Script.RunScriptFile
documentation:
Run script file 

Parameters
----------
filename : str
           script file name with full path

Script runner for general automation and file related processes

Parameters
----------
meas : Measurement
       selected measurement
